info.name: Dimitri Buhon
about: I strive to find simple solutions to complex problems.

career.quote: Themis is the first compliance collaboration tool that helps companies accelerate partnerships with vendors, banks, credit unions, and fintechs.
description: Built and hired the frontend engineering team, establishing a high-performance culture and raising the technical bar across the organization.
Led the successful rearchitecture of the web application, improving scalability, maintainability, and developer velocity.
Drove technical strategy and architecture decisions across major frontend initiatives.
Led the development and delivery of key product features.
Built a shared frontend component library to improve consistency, quality, and development speed.
Introduced AI-powered engineering workflows and tools that increased team productivity while maintaining high quality standards.
Established frontend engineering standards and best practices adopted across the company.
Worked closely with leadership to align technical decisions with product and business goals.

career.quote: Arctic Wolf delivers dynamic 24x7 cybersecurity protection tailored to the specific needs of your organization.
description: Architected the monorepo with Nx.
Led feature development using React and Golang.
Improved coding standards across the company.
Mentored teams on best practices.

career.quote: Unity is the world's leading platform for creating and operating interactive, real-time 3D (RT3D) content.
description: Led the architecture rewrite of the Ads SDK webview, used daily by millions of users.
Led feature development for the Unity Dashboard.
Contributed to the architecture and improved development best practices.
Maintained the frontend component library.

career.quote: LVL designs, builds and operates media technology solutions for the global media and entertainment market.
description: Created a Storefront Manager in React with TypeScript. The tool allowed operators to configure the visual treatment and content of audio and video applications.
Built a web framework with TypeScript.
Developed audio and video on-demand applications.

career.quote: VINCI Construction designs and builds structures and infrastructure that address major issues facing society - global warming, population growth and increasing mobility.
description:
Research and development for mixed reality glasses, Microsoft HoloLens.
Development of a mixed-reality application using Unity and C# that helped with construction site renovations by virtually highlighting areas.

Built an Angular and Electron application displayed on two giant touch screens. The application served as a showcase for the various projects carried out by VINCI Construction and was presented at events and exhibitions.
Developed and maintained web and mobile applications (Angular, Xamarin iOS, C#, ElasticSearch) to monitor compliance with safety, environmental, and quality rules on construction sites.
Developed the VINCI Construction France business and organizational objectives management tool (Angular, C#, Dapper).
Development of a note-taking tool for construction workers to log issues (Angular, C#, CQRS).

career.quote: Ardian is a world-leading private investment house, managing and advising more than $90bn of assets for governments, financial institutions and high net worth individuals globally.
description:
Development of a financial management application.
Back-end programming in C# with Entity Framework and a SQL database.
Front-end with AngularJS/TypeScript.
Unit tests (Fixtures, mock data, TDD).
Coding while following development best practices.

career.quote: AUSY is an international Consulting and Engineering firm in Advanced Technologies with a business model based on innovation and complementary services between information systems and industrial systems.
description:
Development and maintenance of Java projects.
Built a Maven project with Sculptor Generator.
Writing functional and unit tests with Selenium, JBehave, JUnit (TDD, BDD).

Set up a Red Hat Linux continuous integration server.
Configured and installed various tools on the server (Tomcat, Jenkins, SonarQube, OpenLDAP, Git, MySQL, Nexus, Maven).
Configured Jenkins.
Documentation of technical specifications.
Development of a PDF management and auto-filling tool in Java, using iText.

career.company: Institute for Brain and Spinal Cord
career.quote: The Institute for Brain and Spinal Cord is an international brain and spinal cord research center whose innovative concept and structure make it the only institute of its kind in the world.
description:
Intranet development with SharePoint.
Project management, evaluation of user needs, and leading training sessions.
Creation of sites and components, and management of permissions.
Writing technical documentation.
